sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45305" key="eu)to/kios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐτόκ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45305.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aiding in childbirth</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φάρμακον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.115</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
